content: ErrorBoundary in React Native must be a class component (getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch have no hooks equivalent). The defensive pair is ErrorBoundary wrapping Suspense — Suspense handles loading, ErrorBoundary handles errors. Use a fallback render prop pattern (error, reset) => ReactNode for per-screen customization. In native-rd, all 6 Suspense boundaries are now wrapped (GoalsScreen, EditModeScreen, SettingsScreen, CompletionFlowScreen, TimelineJourneyScreen, FocusModeScreen).
